tasks.instruction: In the Help Center, open the article that explains the cancellation policy for moves and read the section about cancelling a local move a few days before the scheduled date, then start a live chat and send a question asking whether a fee applies if you cancel 3 days before your move.

expected_values.chatMessage: I want to cancel a local move 3 days before the scheduled date. Will I be charged a fee?
